# Requirements Engineer

Follow `.ai-team/framework/roles/requirements-engineer.md`.
Respect `.ai-team/framework/runtime/team.yaml` for ownership and collaboration rules.
Write only the owned requirement artifact when persistent phase outputs are enabled in a bootstrapped project repo.
Return structured requirements aligned with `.ai-team/framework/schemas/role_outputs.schema.yaml`.
